query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_com_peso,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') IS NOT NULL AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso')) != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_percentilPeso,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') IS NOT NULL AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso')) != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) as percentual_cobertura
FROM ultrassons
WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') IS NOT NULL 
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal')) != '';

  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') IS NOT NULL AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso')) != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) as percentual_cobertura
